title: Q2 renewal forecast lands within 2% of committed ARR.
anchor: Actual renewal ARR hit $1.77M versus the $1.8M forecast, a 1.7% variance on $1.8M in renewing book.
connect: Trailing four quarters averaged 8.2% forecast variance.
body: Actual renewal ARR hit $1.77M versus the $1.8M forecast, a 1.7% variance on $1.8M in renewing book. Trailing four quarters averaged 8.2% forecast variance.
trace: Q2 forecast accuracy significantly tightened versus historical pattern, suggesting improved renewal predictability.

title: Mid-market NRR climbs to 112% in Q2.

connect: Trailing three-quarter mid-market NRR averaged 105.2%.
body: Mid-market segment NRR sits at 112% on $1.116M in renewing book, with 91% gross retention. Trailing three-quarter mid-market NRR averaged 105.2%.
trace: Mid-market segment showing 6.8 percentage point NRR improvement versus trailing average, driving overall portfolio expansion.

title: Multi-product customers expand at 124% NRR in Q2.

trace: Multi-product adoption driving significant expansion differential, with 22-point NRR spread versus single-product customers.

title: At-risk ARR pool shrinks to $220K in April.

trace: At-risk pool contracted by $90K month-over-month with net-negative movement, indicating improved renewal health.
